name: lugo-vscode
description: A high-performance, zero-allocation Lua 5.4 parser and Language Server (LSP).

lugo.workspace.libraryPaths.description: List of absolute paths to external Lua libraries to index.

lugo.workspace.ignoreGlobs.description: List of globs/files to ignore during indexing. Inherits VS Code's files.exclude automatically.

lugo.environment.knownGlobals.description: List of global variables to ignore when reporting undefined globals.

lugo.diagnostics.undefinedGlobals.description: Enable diagnostics for undefined global variables.

lugo.diagnostics.implicitGlobals.description: Enable diagnostics for implicit global variable creation (e.g., forgetting the 'local' keyword inside a function).

lugo.diagnostics.unusedLocal.description: Enable diagnostics for unused local variables.

lugo.diagnostics.unusedFunction.description: Enable diagnostics for unused local functions.

lugo.diagnostics.unusedParameter.description: Enable diagnostics for unused function parameters (and varargs).

lugo.diagnostics.unusedLoopVar.description: Enable diagnostics for unused loop variables.

lugo.diagnostics.shadowing.description: Enable diagnostics when a local variable shadows a global or outer local.

lugo.diagnostics.unreachableCode.description: Enable diagnostics for unreachable code (e.g. after a return or break).

lugo.diagnostics.ambiguousReturns.description: Enable diagnostics for ambiguous returns where an expression on the next line is accidentally returned.

lugo.diagnostics.deprecated.description: Enable diagnostics for usage of @deprecated symbols.

lugo.inlayHints.parameterNames.description: Enable inline parameter name hints for function and method calls.

lugo.features.documentHighlight.description: Enable document highlights for variables and function/method calls.
